def get_crop_box(box, expand):
    # Extract the coordinates from the original bounding box
    x, y, x1, y1 = box
    # Calculate the center of the original box
    x_c, y_c = (x + x1) // 2, (y + y1) // 2
    # Calculate width and height of the original box
    w, h = x1 - x, y1 - y
    # Calculate half of the size of the expanded box
    s = int(max(w, h) // 2 * expand)
    # Define the new expanded bounding box based on the center and size
    crop_box = [x_c - s, y_c - s, x_c + s, y_c + s]
    return crop_box, s

def get_crop_box(box, expand):
    def get_crop_box(box, expand):
        x, y, x1, y1 = box
        x0, x2 = (x, x1) if x <= x1 else (x1, x)
        y0, y2 = (y, y1) if y <= y1 else (y1, y)
        w = x2 - x0
        h = y2 - y0
        new_w = max(1, int(round(w * float(expand))))
        new_h = max(1, int(round(h * float(expand))))
        size = max(new_w, new_h)
        s = size // 2
        x_c = (x0 + x2) / 2.0
        y_c = (y0 + y2) / 2.0
        left = int(round(x_c - s))
        top = int(round(y_c - s))
        right = left + size
        bottom = top + size
        return [left, top, right, bottom], s
